decisions.title_en: SpaceX signs deal for $60B option to acquire Cursor or pay $10B
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. New actor (SpaceX) and new core event (acquisition option) distinct from prior cursor-50b-valuation story (fundraise). SpaceX preempted Cursor's $2B/$50B fundraise with a $60B buyout option exercisable later in 2026 or a $10B payment for collaboration.

decisions.title_en: Google unveils Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform at Cloud Next 2026
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Google rebranded/evolved Vertex AI into Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform with Agent Studio, Agent Registry, A2A protocol, managed MCP, 200+ models including Anthropic Claude; ADK + no-code low-code builder.

decisions.title_en: Google previews TPU 8t (Broadcom training) + TPU 8i (MediaTek inference) on 2nm
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Google first-ever split training/inference TPU: TPU 8t 'Sunfish' by Broadcom (121 EFLOPS, 9,600-chip superpod) + TPU 8i 'Zebrafish' by MediaTek (384MB SRAM, 288GB HBM, 80% better perf/$). TSMC 2nm, late 2027. New architectural strategy.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI launches Codex-powered Workspace Agents for ChatGPT teams
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. OpenAI introduced shared 'workspace agents' in ChatGPT powered by Codex, explicitly replacing Custom GPTs. Teams can create shared long-running agents with enterprise permissioning.

decisions.title_en: Tencent and Alibaba in talks to invest in DeepSeek at $20B+ valuation
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. DeepSeek valuation doubled from $10B to $20B+ in 5 days as Tencent and Alibaba joined funding talks with High-Flyer. First outside capital for the firm, driven by inference/infrastructure shift.

decisions.title_en: Tesla Q1 2026 earnings beat; Musk commits to unsupervised FSD in 'dozen states' by year-end
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Prior tesla-unsupervised-robotaxi-dallas-houston covered the robotaxi launch specifically; this is the Q1 earnings release with $22.387B revenue, $0.41 EPS beat, and new Musk commitment to dozen-state unsupervised robotaxi rollout by end-2026. Distinct event.

decisions.title_en: Google launches Workspace Intelligence with agentic mini-apps in Sheets/Docs
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Separate product from Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform: Workspace Intelligence brings unified semantic understanding across Docs/Slides/Gmail plus canvas mini-apps (dashboards, kanban), skills-based automation, and agent governance controls.

decisions.title_en: Bezos-backed Project Prometheus nears $10B raise at $38B valuation
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Jeff Bezos's AI venture Project Prometheus close to closing $10B funding at $38B valuation — first major Bezos-led AI vehicle stepping into frontier model ring on funding scale comparable to xAI early rounds.

decisions.title_en: Google's Thomas Kurian formally confirms Gemini-powered Siri at Cloud Next
decisions.reason: Previously published 2026-04-15 with title 'Apple Siri 工程师被送去 AI「训练营」：iOS 27 Siri 2.0 已是最后一次机会' which already named Gemini as the engine behind Siri 2.0. The Thomas Kurian on-stage confirmation and 'preferred cloud provider' framing add Google-side PR color but no new substantive fact about the partnership terms, timeline or product. Rehash.

decisions.title_en: NVIDIA launches Ising open quantum AI models
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-04-14 is 9 days old (>5 day limit). Original launch was April 14, not April 22 as initially mis-indexed.

decisions.title_en: Google Cloud commits $750M to accelerate partners' agentic AI
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback so filter pass is novel_story, but editorial judgment: $750M partner fund is an incremental funding mechanism beneath the larger Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform story already kept. Better covered as a paragraph inside google-cloud-next-agent-platform than as its own card. Consolidated, not published separately.
